---
title: "Beach Safety Optimization on Oahu"
author: "Ashley Holen"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Intro

Put intro here

## Set up

```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false

install.packages('spopt', repos = c('https://walkerke.r-universe.dev', 'https://cloud.r-project.org'))

library(tidyverse)
library(sf)
library(mapview)
library(spopt)
library(here)
```

## Loading in Data

```{r}
towers <- st_read(here("data/Lifeguard_Towers.geojson"), quiet = TRUE)

towers <- towers |>
  st_transform(4326)
```

```{r}
access <- st_read(here("data/Shoreline_Public_Access.geojson"), quiet = TRUE) |>
  st_transform(4326)

# Filter to unguarded sandy sites
candidate_sites <- access |>
  filter(
    lifeguard == "No",
    str_detect(shore_type, "Sand")
  ) |>
  mutate(site_id = row_number())
```

```{r}
beach_raw <- read_csv(here("data/beachdata.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE)

# Clean column names and parse numeric fields
beach_data <- beach_raw |>
  rename(
    beach_park    = `Beach Park`,
    coordinates   = `Cooordinates`,
    attendance    = Attendance,
    public_contact = `Public Contact`,
    prev_action   = `Prevent. Action`,
    rescues       = Rescues,
    first_aid_minor = `1st Aid Minor`,
    first_aid_report = `1st Aid Report`,
    surf_accidents = `Surf Accidents`,
    drownings     = Drownings
  ) |>
  # Strip commas, regular spaces, and non-breaking spaces (\xa0) before parsing
  mutate(across(c(attendance, public_contact, prev_action, rescues,
                  first_aid_minor, first_aid_report, surf_accidents, drownings),
                ~ as.numeric(str_remove_all(.x, "[,\\s\u00a0]+")))) |>
  mutate(drownings = replace_na(drownings, 0)) |>
  # Parse coordinate string into lat/lon — kept as plain columns for now
  separate(coordinates, into = c("lat", "lon"), sep = ",\\s*", convert = TRUE)

# Preview the data before converting to sf
#glimpse(beach_data)
```

Shoreline Public Access Points

```{r}
mapview(access, color = "blue", col.regions = "blue")
```

Existing Lifeguard Towers

```{r}
mapview(towers, color = "green", col.regions = "green")
```

Combined Map

```{r}
beach_sf <- st_as_sf(beach_data, coords = c("lon", "lat"), crs = 4326) |>
  mutate(rescues_per_capita = rescues / attendance * 100000)

mapview(beach_sf,
        zcol = "rescues_per_capita",
        layer.name = "Rescues per 100k Visitors",
        col.regions = RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(9, "YlOrRd"),
        cex = "rescues_per_capita") +
  mapview(access,
          color = "blue",
          col.regions = "blue",
          layer.name = "Public Access Points") +
  mapview(towers,
          color = "green",
          col.regions = "green",
          layer.name = "Lifeguard Towers")
```

Calculating Composite Safety Need

```{r}
beach_data <- beach_data |>
  mutate(
    # Attendance-weighted rescue rate
    rescues_per_capita = rescues / attendance * 100000,

    # Normalize each indicator to 0–1
    rescues_scaled = (rescues_per_capita - min(rescues_per_capita, na.rm = TRUE)) /
      (max(rescues_per_capita, na.rm = TRUE) - min(rescues_per_capita, na.rm = TRUE)),
    
    drownings_scaled = (drownings - min(drownings, na.rm = TRUE)) /
      (max(drownings, na.rm = TRUE) - min(drownings, na.rm = TRUE)),
    
    surf_scaled = (replace_na(surf_accidents, 0) - min(replace_na(surf_accidents, 0), na.rm = TRUE)) /
      (max(replace_na(surf_accidents, 0), na.rm = TRUE) - min(replace_na(surf_accidents, 0), na.rm = TRUE)),
    
    attendance_scaled = (attendance - min(attendance, na.rm = TRUE)) /
      (max(attendance, na.rm = TRUE) - min(attendance, na.rm = TRUE)),

    # Composite safety need score (0–100)
    # Rescues per capita: 40%, drownings: 30%, surf accidents: 20%, attendance: 10%
    safety_need = (rescues_scaled   * 40 +
                   drownings_scaled * 30 +
                   surf_scaled      * 20 +
                   attendance_scaled * 10) * 100
  )

# Convert to sf now that all mutations are done
beach_sf <- beach_data |>
  st_as_sf(coords = c("lon", "lat"), crs = 4326)

# Preview top beaches by safety need
beach_data |>
  select(beach_park, attendance, rescues_per_capita, drownings, surf_accidents, safety_need) |>
  arrange(desc(safety_need)) |>
  knitr::kable(digits = 1, caption = "Beach parks ranked by composite safety need score")
```

Assign Demand Scores to Candidate Sites

```{r}
# Nearest-neighbor join: match each candidate to its closest beach park
nearest_idx <- st_nearest_feature(candidate_sites, beach_sf)

# Calculate actual distance to nearest beach park (to flag data-poor sites)
nearest_dist <- st_distance(candidate_sites, beach_sf[nearest_idx, ], by_element = TRUE)

candidate_sites <- candidate_sites |>
  mutate(
    nearest_beach    = beach_data$beach_park[nearest_idx],
    safety_need      = beach_data$safety_need[nearest_idx],
    dist_to_beach_km = as.numeric(nearest_dist) / 1000,
    # Flag sites >5 km from any beach park as data-poor
    data_poor        = dist_to_beach_km > 5
  )

cat("Median distance to nearest beach park:", 
    round(median(candidate_sites$dist_to_beach_km), 1), "km\n")
cat("Sites flagged as data-poor (>5 km):", 
    sum(candidate_sites$data_poor), "of", nrow(candidate_sites), "\n")
```

Calculate Distance to Nearest Existing Tower

```{r}
# Distance matrix: each candidate to every existing tower
tower_dist_matrix <- st_distance(candidate_sites, towers)

candidate_sites <- candidate_sites |>
  mutate(
    dist_to_nearest_tower_m  = as.numeric(apply(tower_dist_matrix, 1, min)),
    dist_to_nearest_tower_km = dist_to_nearest_tower_m / 1000
  )

summary(candidate_sites$dist_to_nearest_tower_km)
```

Composite Site Score

```{r}
candidate_sites <- candidate_sites |>
  mutate(
    # Normalize coverage gap to 0–1 (higher = farther from existing tower)
    coverage_gap_scaled = (dist_to_nearest_tower_km - min(dist_to_nearest_tower_km)) /
      (max(dist_to_nearest_tower_km) - min(dist_to_nearest_tower_km)),

    # Normalize safety need to 0–1
    need_scaled = safety_need / 100,

    # Uncertainty weight: data-poor sites get a boost (precautionary principle)
    uncertainty = if_else(data_poor, 1, 0),

    # Composite score: coverage gap 40%, safety need 40%, uncertainty 20%
    site_score = (coverage_gap_scaled * 40 +
                  need_scaled         * 40 +
                  uncertainty         * 20)
  )

# Preview top candidate sites
candidate_sites |>
  st_drop_geometry() |>
  select(name, nearest_beach, safety_need, dist_to_nearest_tower_km, data_poor, site_score) |>
  arrange(desc(site_score)) |>
  head(10) |>
  knitr::kable(digits = 2, caption = "Top 10 candidate sites by composite score")
```

Spatial Optimization

```{r}
# Scenario 1: Safety-driven — p-median weighted by beach park safety need
# Demand = 21 beach parks; optimizer pulls new tower toward high-rescue zones
result_safety <- p_median(
  demand       = beach_sf,
  facilities   = candidate_sites,
  n_facilities = 1,
  weight_col   = "safety_need"
)

# Scenario 2: Location-driven — p-center on unguarded candidate sites
# Purely geometric; finds the site that minimizes the maximum distance
# to any unguarded access point, ignoring rescue history entirely
result_location <- p_center(
  demand       = candidate_sites,
  facilities   = candidate_sites,
  n_facilities = 1
)

# Extract selected sites
optimal_safety   <- result_safety$facilities   |> filter(.selected)
optimal_location <- result_location$facilities |> filter(.selected)

# Compare scenarios
tibble(
  Scenario              = c("Safety-Driven (p-median)", "Location-Driven (p-center)"),
  `Selected Site`       = c(optimal_safety$name,   optimal_location$name),
  `Safety Need`         = c(round(optimal_safety$safety_need, 1),
                             round(optimal_location$safety_need, 1)),
  `Dist. to Tower (km)` = c(round(optimal_safety$dist_to_nearest_tower_km, 2),
                             round(optimal_location$dist_to_nearest_tower_km, 2)),
  `Data Poor`           = c(optimal_safety$data_poor, optimal_location$data_poor)
) |>
  knitr::kable(caption = "Optimization scenario comparison — 1 new lifeguard stand")
```

Results Visualization

```{r}
mapview(beach_sf,
        zcol = "safety_need",
        layer.name = "Safety Need by Beach Park",
        col.regions = RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(9, "YlOrRd"),
        alpha.regions = 0.7) +
  mapview(towers,
          col.regions = "green",
          cex = 5,
          layer.name = "Existing Towers") +
  mapview(candidate_sites,
          zcol = "site_score",
          col.regions = RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(9, "Blues"),
          cex = 3,
          layer.name = "Candidate Sites (by Score)") +
  mapview(optimal_safety,
          col.regions = "red",
          cex = 10,
          layer.name = "Optimal: Safety-Driven") +
  mapview(optimal_location,
          col.regions = "purple",
          cex = 10,
          layer.name = "Optimal: Location-Driven")
```
